# Code Examples

## JavaScript

```javascript
function greet(name) {
  console.log(`Hello, ${name}!`);
}

greet("World");
```

## Rust

```rust
fn main() {
    println!("Hello, world!");
}
```

## Python

```python
def fibonacci(n):
    if n <= 1:
        return n
    return fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2)

print(fibonacci(10))
```

## Inline code

Use `const` instead of `var` in modern JavaScript.
